style: Photorealistic portrait, soft natural studio lighting, shallow depth of field, warm and hopeful mood, centered head-and-shoulders, plain softly-blurred neutral background, high detail, editorial travel-brand quality, no text, no watermark.

characters.prompt: A 34-year-old French woman, Camille, seated in a sleek modern electric wheelchair, warm confident smile, short wavy brown hair, light makeup, wearing a stylish teal travel coat, holding a smartphone, looking hopeful and independent.
A friendly airport special-assistance staff member in her 40s, professional airline uniform with a lanyard and headset, welcoming smile, standing in a bright modern airport terminal.

An elegant hotel receptionist in his 30s, tailored dark blazer with a name badge, polite professional smile, standing behind a warm-lit boutique hotel reception desk on the French Riviera. Square 1:1 image, face centered - it is displayed in a small circular avatar.

avatars.prompt: Generate an image with a transparent background: the avatar of a small cute robot AI travel assistant - a stylized 3D character, head and upper body, clearly a robot (not a human): a rounded glossy white robot head with a smooth dark screen face showing two large friendly glowing sky-blue eyes and a subtle smile, a compact rounded white body with elegant accents in a gradient from deep blue (#1d4ed8) to bright sky blue (#7dd3fc), and a soft outer glow. Professional and trustworthy yet adorable and completely non-aggressive - rounded shapes only, no sharp angles, no human skin or hair, no circuit lines. Minimal and modern, matching a dark navy travel-app brand. No text, no watermark. Square 1:1, character centered with generous padding - it is displayed small as a circular avatar.

App icon logo for TripAssist, an AI travel-accessibility assistant. A rounded-square app icon on a deep navy background (#0f172a): a glowing map pin whose head holds a bold check mark, drawn in a luminous gradient from deep blue (#1d4ed8) to bright sky blue (#7dd3fc), a subtle dotted travel route curving up into the pin, soft outer glow. Minimal, modern, flat design with subtle depth, crisp edges, reads clearly at small favicon sizes. No text, no letters, no watermark. Square 1:1.
